# Statsministerens kontor

*1 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Instruks for Regjeringen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) | Regjeringsinstruksen |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) |
